de.uka.ilkd.key.core

Interface KeYSelectionListener

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    GoalList.GoalListSelectionListener, InfoView.InfoViewSelectionListener, KeYMediator.KeYMediatorSelectionListener, LeafPanel.SelectionListener, MainWindow.DPEnableControl, MainWindow.MainProofListener, ProofTreeView.GUIProofTreeProofListener, TaskTree.TaskTreeSelectionListener

    public interface KeYSelectionListener
    The KeYSelectionListener is notified if the proof or the node the user works with has changed.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void selectedNodeChanged(KeYSelectionEvent e)
      focused node has changed
      void selectedProofChanged(KeYSelectionEvent e)
      the selected proof has changed (e.g. a new proof has been loaded)

    • Method Detail

      • selectedNodeChanged

        void selectedNodeChanged(KeYSelectionEvent e)
        focused node has changed

      • selectedProofChanged

        void selectedProofChanged(KeYSelectionEvent e)
        the selected proof has changed (e.g. a new proof has been loaded)
